caption: A screen recording captures a web browser navigating a giveaway process. The initial view displays a list of numbered names, including "11. Michael Loguericio" and "15. Michael Loguericio*", alongside a "RANDOM.ORG" timestamp and a link to "https://bit.ly/NzeS8k9". A man with a beard and dark clothing is partially visible in a small video window at the bottom right. As the recording progresses, the user clicks "Again!", causing the browser to navigate to a "RANDOM.ORG" page with a "List Randomizer" heading. This page states, "There were 30 items in your list. Here they are in random order:" and lists names like "1. Scott Eckert" and "2. Michael Loguericio". The video then cuts back to the original giveaway list. Throughout the sequence, a red banner for "CASEBREAKS.COM" remains visible at the bottom of the screen.
